docs.title: FR_EPS_001
docs.subtitle: Battery shall not be discharged below 22.0 V during eclipse

docs.title: FR_EPS_002
docs.subtitle: Solar array deployment shall not be commanded while in eclipse

docs.title: FR_ADCS_001
docs.subtitle: Reaction wheel commanded RPM shall not exceed +/- 5500

docs.title: FR_ADCS_002
docs.subtitle: ADCS mode transition to INERTIAL requires star tracker lock

docs.title: FR_COMM_001
docs.subtitle: Transmitter shall not be enabled while ground station is below 5 deg elevation

docs.title: FR_CDH_001
docs.subtitle: Memory patches shall be uplinked only during contact passes with full uplink margin

docs.title: FR_THM_001
docs.subtitle: Battery heater shall remain on whenever battery temperature < 5 degC

docs.title: FR_PAY_001
docs.subtitle: Imaging shall not be commanded while ADCS is in SAFE

docs.title: FR_PAY_002
docs.subtitle: Instrument shall not be powered on while detector temperature > 20 degC

docs.title: FR_PROP_001
docs.subtitle: Burns shall not be executed with tank pressure < 1000 kPa

docs.title: FR_PROP_003
docs.subtitle: Propellant temperature shall remain above 5 degC at all times
